name: Mechelen

overview.description: Mechelen is a charming, walkable city midway between Brussels and Antwerp with a well-preserved historic centre. Content below is a starter sample.
whyVisit: Convenient location between Brussels and Antwerp

attractions.name: St. Rumbold's Cathedral
attractions.description: A UNESCO-listed belfry tower with panoramic views.

transportation.description: On the main Brussels-Antwerp line, roughly 25 minutes from each.

tips: Mechelen makes a quieter alternative base to Brussels or Antwerp.
Content on this page is a starter sample pending admin review.
